testcase.name: test_pickle_custom_cache_dir

failure.message: OSError: Not found: "<coroutine object http_get at 0x11dc19a80>": No such file or directory Error #2

testcase.failure:
self = <bpemb.tests.bpemb_test.BPEmbTest testMethod=test_pickle_custom_cache_dir>
def test_pickle_custom_cache_dir(self): import pickle from tempfile import mkdtemp from pathlib import Path > bpemb = BPEmb(lang="en", vs=1000, dim=25, cache_dir=mkdtemp()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

self = <sentencepiece.SentencePieceProcessor; proxy of <Swig Object of type 'sentencepiece::SentencePieceProcessor *' at 0x11dc574e0> > arg = '<coroutine object http_get at 0x11dc19a80>'

.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/sentencepiece/__init__.py:316: OSError
